channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Shashi Tharoor avoids question on Kerala CM post as Congress leads in exit polls
item.description: As Kerala prepares for vote counting in the 2026 Assembly elections, the Congress-led United Democratic Front (UDF) appears poised for victory according to exit polls. The key question on everyone's m...

item.title: Tragic Discovery in Uttar Pradesh: Mother and Four Children Found Dead
item.description: In a deeply disturbing incident from Uttar Pradesh, authorities discovered the bodies of four children in a home, followed by the shocking discovery of their mother’s body in a nearby drain the next d...

item.title: Alberta government and advocates debate wild horse population levels
item.description: Alberta's government reports that the population of free-roaming horses along the eastern slopes of the Rocky Mountains has reached record levels, calling them 'unacceptable' under its horse managemen...

item.title: Fort McMurray 10 Years After the 2016 Wildfire: Recovery, Reflection, and Preparedness
item.description: Ten years after the devastating 2016 Horse River Wildfire, which destroyed over 2,500 homes in Fort McMurray, the community has largely rebuilt while carrying the emotional scars of the disaster. Many...

item.title: Ambush on rural road in Benue kills four travellers
item.description: At least four people have been killed in an armed attack along the Aila–Odugheho road in Agatu Local Government Area of Benue State. Residents told Daily Trust that the victims were ambushed on Saturd...

item.title: PBA: Ginebra defeats Rain or Shine behind Justin Brownlee's strong performance
item.description: In a thrilling PBA Commissioner's Cup matchup, Barangay Ginebra San Miguel secured a much-needed victory against Rain or Shine Elasto Painters. Justin Brownlee delivered an outstanding performance, ca...

item.title: Poilievre calls on Carney to clarify Canada’s position ahead of USMCA negotiations
item.description: Conservative Leader Pierre Poilievre is urging Prime Minister Mark Carney to clearly outline Canada’s negotiating position and sources of leverage as the country prepares for renewed trade discussions...

item.title: UBA Hosts Pan-African Conference to Strengthen Bank-Fintech Partnerships
item.description: United Bank for Africa (UBA) don show say dem serious about making banks and fintech companies work together across Africa. For their first ever Fintech Conference wey dem call 'Navigating Regulatory ...

item.title: Road rage killings highlight deeper social and systemic failures in South Africa
item.description: A fatal road rage incident in Emmarentia, Johannesburg, where a minor bumper-bash escalated into a deadly shooting, has reignited concern about violence on South African roads. The tragedy left a fath...

item.title: Four Green Card Holders in New Jersey Face Federal Charges for Illegal Voting
item.description: Four green card holders living in New Jersey have been federally charged for illegally voting in U.S. elections and providing false statements on their applications for naturalization. The individuals...

item.title: James Cleverly criticises illegal camp construction in Willows Green during bank holiday
item.description: James Cleverly, Conservative MP for Essex, has expressed outrage after travellers began constructing an illegal camp in the village of Willows Green over the May bank holiday weekend. The development,...

item.title: Aurat March Karachi faces NOC delay, organisers appeal to Aseefa Bhutto Zardari
item.description: Karachi ki Aurat March organisers ne Sunday ko kaha ke ab tak unko NOC (No Objection Certificate) issue nahi hua hai, jab ke march 10 May ko plan hai. Organisers ne authorities se koi positive respons...

item.title: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio to Meet Vatican Officials Amid Trump-Pope Dispute
item.description: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio dey go Rome and the Vatican this week, according to Italian government sources, just weeks after President Donald Trump sharply criticize Pope Leo XIV for him anti-wa...

item.title: Vosloorus man returns home after month-long abduction, family concerned for his wellbeing
item.description: Mazwi Kubheka, a spaza shop owner from Vosloorus, returned home after being missing for a month. He walked to Carnival City in Brakpan, where an unknown motorist drove him near the Vosloorus police st...

item.title: 2026 State Assembly Election Results: Seats and Majority Thresholds in Five States and UT
item.description: The news article is intended to report the assembly election results for the year 2026 across several Indian states, including West Bengal, Tamil Nadu, Kerala, Assam, and the Union Territory of Puduch...

item.title: Minnesota Twins’ Starter Joe Ryan Exits Early Due to Injury
item.description: During the Minnesota Twins' game against the Toronto Blue Jays on Sunday, starting pitcher Joe Ryan had to leave the game after throwing just nine pitches. Ryan gave up a walk to Vladimir Guerrero Jr....

item.title: Newfoundland Pharmacist Reunited with Lost Graduation Ring After Two Decades
item.description: Bradley Buckle, a pharmacist and co-owner of a Pharmasave in St. John's, Newfoundland and Labrador, lost his graduation ring from Memorial University's pharmacy program in 2002. For almost 20 years, h...

item.title: Pakistani Media Organisations Raise Alarm Over Global Press Freedom Challenges
item.description: On World Press Freedom Day, the Joint Action Committee (JAC) comprising Pakistan's key media organisations — PBA, APNS, CPNE, AMEND, and PFUJ — expressed deep concern over the deteriorating state of f...

item.title: UK raises terrorism threat level following attacks on Jewish community
item.description: The UK government has elevated the national terrorism threat level to 'severe', the second-highest in the five-tier system, following a stabbing of two Jewish men in London and a series of arson attac...

item.title: Peter Obi Leaves ADC Citing Internal Crises and Political Challenges
item.description: Peter Obi don announce say him don decide to waka from the African Democratic Congress (ADC) as Nigeria dey prepare for 2027 elections. For him message wey e post for him official X handle, Obi talk s...
